svg.text: R(2+1)D-18 · MViT v2 Small · EchoNet-Dynamic · 6 GB VRAM Constraint
Phase 2: ΔAUC = 0.0343 · 95% CI [0.0132, 0.0567] — excludes zero → MViT advantage is statistically significant
Hardware · NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Laptop GPU · 6 GB VRAM · PyTorch AMP (FP16) · AdamW + ReduceLROnPlateau
MViT batch size halved vs CNN to prevent OOM · 5-clip averaging at inference · Thresholds locked on validation set
EchoNet-Dynamic dataset (Stanford) · 10,030 echocardiogram videos · HFrEF threshold: EF ≤ 40% · Split: 75 / 12.5 / 12.5
